title: Haworthia semimargaritifera
taxonomy: Haworthia semimargaritifera is a species of succulent plant, and it belongs to the family Asphodelaceae. The genus Haworthia is a group of small to medium-sized succulents that are native to southern Africa. Haworthia semimargaritifera is further classified into the subfamily Asphodeloideae. This classification suggests a close relationship with other succulent plants in the Asphodelaceae family. The species is also often grouped with other Haworthia species due to shared characteristics and geographical distribution.

The plant's leaves contain compounds with potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
